certainty: Printed as a "lecture possible": "AB 09-A 3̣3̣2̣ 2". AB 09 (= SE) carries no editorial marks; A 332 (= *332) is printed with under-dots beneath ALL THREE digits (3̣3̣2̣ = the whole sign uncertain). No brackets printed. Del Freo adds that on this possible reading "continuent à peser les doutes déjà exprimés" (the doubts of Rapport 2006-2010, 12-13 still stand).
source: Del Freo, Rapport 2016-2021, KO-RO-NO-WE-SA (Ariadne Suppl. 5), p. 106 (sha 40486242...); primary: Tzachili, I. & Karnava, A. 2016, An inscribed lychnos base from Akrotiri, Thera, Minos 39, 27-40 (editio princeps)
notes: Graffito on the Akrotiri lamp (lychnos), EfA inv. V 15; Tzachili identifies the possible findspot as either the zone between Xeste 2 and Complex Delta, or Sector Beta (p. 105). The trailing "2" in the printed reading is a NUMERAL (kept out of words). NUMBERING DISPUTE recorded by the rapport (p. 106): "L'inscription est numérotée par les éditeurs comme Zb 15, mais il vaut mieux de la classifier comme Zb 14" — i.e. the editio princeps (Tzachili & Karnava 2016) numbers it THE Zb 15, but Del Freo classifies it THE Zb 14, the numbering already suggested in Rapport 2006-2010 (reasons set out in Rapport 2001-2005, 210: the competing fragment inv. no. 1262 from Room Delta 3, already excluded by GORILA IV, xxi sub TE Z 4, is difficult to class as an inscription because its second sign lacks clear Linear A parallels; Notti 2018's AB 41 suggestion for that sign is rejected by Del Freo & Zurbach after autopsy, fn. 95).
numbering_dispute: Editors (Tzachili & Karnava 2016): THE Zb 15; Del Freo (this rapport, following Rapport 2006-2010): THE Zb 14 — id above follows the rapport.
